title: Settlement Agreement — CV-2025-01122
text:
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND MUTUAL RELEASE

This Settlement Agreement is entered into by and between:

Plaintiff: Angela Brooks, residing at 901 Willow Court, Portland, OR 97201
Defendant: Northwest Pacific Holdings, LLC
Case No. CV-2025-01122

WHEREAS, the parties wish to resolve all claims arising from the incident of September 3, 2025;

NOW THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual promises contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

1. SETTLEMENT AMOUNT
Defendant agrees to pay Plaintiff the sum of $87,500.00. Payment shall be made within thirty (30) days.

2. RELEASE OF CLAIMS
The plaintiff, Angela Brooks, hereby releases all claims. The undersigned acknowledges receipt. The defendant denies liability.

3. EXHIBITS
Exhibit A — Medical Records Summary
Exhibit B — Insurance Correspondence
Exhibit C — Wage Loss Calculation

4. CONTACT
All notices shall be directed to Counsel at Law, 4400 Morrison Street, Portland, OR 97201.
Direct inquiries to (503) 772-0044.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement.

Angela Brooks
Northwest Pacific Holdings, LLC
Claims Adjuster: Mr. Thomas Reid
